children.label: i
children.text: any judgment, settlement, fine, penalty, or cost assessment (including prevailing party legal fees) associated with the applicable litigation; and

children.label: ii
children.text: any cost incurred in handling the applicable litigation (including legal fees); and

children.label: B
children.text: with respect to a Federal firefighter, arranging for, and paying the costs of, representation in the applicable litigation.

children.heading: Federal firefighter
children.label: 2 Federal firefighter
children.text: The term “Federal firefighter” means an individual furnished by the Secretary of Agriculture or the Secretary of the Interior under an agreement entered into under .section 1856n of this title

children.heading: Foreign fire organization
children.label: 3 Foreign fire organization
children.text: The term “foreign fire organization” means any foreign governmental, public, or private entity that has wildfire protection resources.

children.heading: Foreign firefighter
children.label: 4 Foreign firefighter
children.text: The term “foreign firefighter” means an individual furnished by a foreign fire organization under an agreement entered into under .section 1856n of this title

children.heading: Wildfire
children.label: 5 Wildfire
children.text: The term “wildfire” means any forest or range fire.

children.heading: Wildfire protection resources
children.label: 6 Wildfire protection resources
children.text: The term “wildfire protection resources” means any personnel, supplies, equipment, or other resources required for wildfire presuppression and suppression activities.
